mapper.insert:
insert into announce ( announce_title, link, author, exc_insttNm, description, lcategory, pub_date, reqst_start_date, reqst_end_date,hashtags, taget_name, view_num, file_path_name, file_name, how_to_register, call_company ,print_file_name , print_file_path_name) values ( #{announceTitle}, #{link}, #{author}, #{excInsttNm}, #{description}, #{lcategory}, #{pubDate}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{hashtags} , #{targetName}, #{viewNum}, #{filePathName}, #{fileName}, #{howToRegister}, #{callCompany} ,#{printFileName} ,#{printFilePathName} )
on duplicate key update announce_title = values(announce_title), author = values(author), exc_insttNm = values(exc_insttNm), description = values(description), lcategory = values(lcategory), pub_date = values(pub_date), hashtags = values(hashtags), reqst_start_date = values(reqst_start_date), reqst_end_date = values(reqst_end_date), taget_name = values(taget_name), view_num = values(view_num), file_path_name = values(file_path_name), file_name = values(file_name), how_to_register= values(how_to_register), call_company = values(call_company), print_file_name = values(print_file_name), print_file_path_name = values(print_file_path_name), created_at = now()
mapper.select: select announce_id, announce_title, link, author, exc_insttNm, description, lcategory, pub_date, reqst_start_date, reqst_end_date, taget_name, view_num, hashtags, file_path_name, file_name, how_to_register, call_company, print_file_name, print_file_path_name from announce

select announce_id,announce_title, link, author, exc_insttNm, description, lcategory, pub_date, reqst_start_date, reqst_end_date, taget_name, view_num, file_path_name, file_name,hashtags, how_to_register, call_company ,print_file_name , print_file_path_name from announce where announce_id=#{announceId}

select announce_id,announce_title, link, author, exc_insttNm, description, lcategory, pub_date, reqst_start_date, reqst_end_date, taget_name, view_num, file_path_name, file_name,hashtags, how_to_register, call_company ,print_file_name , print_file_path_name from announce where announce_id=#{id}
SELECT announce_id, announce_title, view_num FROM announce ORDER BY view_num DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT announce_id, announce_title, view_num FROM announce WHERE announce_id = #{announceId}
